prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - carbohydrate loading for endurance event tomorrow with 3000+ calorie intake and strategic hydration timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrates (55-65% of total intake)
Includes 4-5 eating occasions with hydration timing specified around meals and training
Provides 1 day structure only with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks clearly labeled
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration timing

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gain with optimized protein intake and pre/post-workout nutrition
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy, vegetarian protein sources only

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus pre/post-workout nutrition within a single day
Protein-heavy macronutrient distribution (minimum 30% calories from protein) suitable for strength training
All meals and snacks adhere to vegetarian and dairy-free restrictions
Includes specific meal timing recommendations around workout window
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-focused athlete (weightlifter) requiring protein-heavy meals with specific macronutrient ratios and meal timing around workout windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Pre-match energy and recovery for soccer performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals and includes pre-match timing considerations
All meals are vegan with no animal products
Includes nutrient-dense plant-based options providing adequate protein, carbohydrates, and healthy fats for athletic performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan soccer player) requiring nutrient-dense plant-based options that meet performance needs while adhering to dietary restrictions
